content: We can reframe Self-Refine’s single-stream iterative improvement framework by integrating multiple inconsistent self-perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective self-refine framework that retains Self-Refine’s core advantage of no additional training or supervision while boosting output quality beyond what single-stream self-feedback can achieve. This hybrid framework leverages the internal inconsistency that LLMs already generate naturally to create more critical self-feedback, rather than relying on the same perspective for repeated iteration that can get stuck in local optima.
